name: Spinanch Balls
recipeIngredient: 20 oz Frozen chopped spinach, cooked and well-drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients and form into teaspoon-sized balls.
2. Place the balls on a cookie sheet and freeze.
3. After frozen, place in a plastic bag and return to freezer until the party.
4. To use, place frozen spinach balls on a cookie sheet and bake at 350°F for 20 minutes or until lightly browned.
5. Serve with toothpicks.
